entities.name: HEALTHY FOOD
entities.description: Nutritious, safe, and healthy food demanded by a growing population

entities.name: GROWING POPULATION
entities.description: The increase in human population driving food demand

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of life and resources to be maintained

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of farming, threatened by climate change

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The changing global climate posing a challenge to agriculture

entities.name: HEALTHY DIETS
entities.description: Diverse diets largely based on plant-derived food to reduce illnesses

entities.name: PLANT-DERIVED FOOD
entities.description: Food sourced from plants, forming the basis of healthy diets

entities.name: DIET-RELATED ILLNESSES
entities.description: Health issues that can be reduced by diverse and healthy diets

entities.name: PLANT SCIENCES
entities.description: Scientific study of plants used to design cropping systems

entities.name: DIVERSE CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems designed to balance productivity, sustainability, and nutrition

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of food production in cropping systems

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability to maintain agricultural production without depleting resources

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL QUALITY
entities.description: The nutrient density and health value of cultivars and food

entities.name: CULTIVAR DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of cultivated plant varieties

entities.name: SOIL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in soil quality and health

entities.name: EXTERNAL INPUTS
entities.description: Resources added to farming systems, such as fertilizers and pesticides

entities.name: FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical or organic substances added to soil to increase fertility

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Substances used for destroying pests

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to withstand attacks from pests

entities.name: EMERGING PESTS
entities.description: New or evolving pests that threaten crops
